msg_upload_hint: Click blank area, drag & drop, or paste to upload. Image size must be under 2MB. Only PNG, JPG, JPEG formats supported.
msg_upload_hint_with_video: Click blank area, drag & drop, or paste to upload images/videos. Images must be under 2MB, videos under 20MB. Only PNG, JPG, JPEG, MP4 formats are supported.
msg_invalid_format: Only JPG and PNG formats are supported.
msg_invalid_media_format: Only PNG, JPG, JPEG, MP4 formats are supported.
msg_paste_not_supported: Current browser does not support paste upload!
msg_paste_invalid_media: Please paste a valid image or video.
